28.reason: [The problem requires right child to include values >= root, but this code skips insertion when data == root->data, causing duplicates to be ignored and potentially altering tree structure and leaf nodes.]

41.reason: [The traversal is preorder (visit current node before children), but the problem expects left-to-right order of leaf nodes, which corresponds to inorder traversal. This may output leaf nodes in incorrect order.]
